race.comment: ACAPPELLA MOON (4) had to duck back to the inside for a run and finished with a head of steam to just miss here two weeks ago. Cherry-ripe now with four runs under her belt. Gets her chance to break a long drought. AUTUMN FROST (1) was very impressive here on November 29 when leading all the way. Hasn't been far away in her last two and arrives with fresh legs off 56 days. Will have company in front but has the ticker to go on with it. BIG BRUTE (2) is one of his pace rivals and should be at his top fourth-up. Never missed the frame over this distance and is sure to be right there. ROUND TWO (3) has been back somewhere near his best in his last two after a 63-day freshen. Expect him to stalk the early speed and be poised to strike when they sprint. THREATENING (5) will relish the anticipated tempo and will be sweating on the gap to appear.
